message:
fix: extend sparkline history from 2 hours to 12 hours (#169)

Record snapshots every 30s instead of 5s (every 6th tick). Same 1440
point buffer now covers 12 hours instead of 2, giving sparklines
meaningful trends instead of flat noise.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
